feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Iran asserts control over Strait of Hormuz, challenges navigation rights #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Iran's stance could disrupt global oil transit and challenge international maritime norms, impacting geopolitical stability and trade routes. The post Iran asserts control over Strait of Hormuz, challenges navigation rights appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Fitch switches outlook on Landbank, DBP to ‘negative’ #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Fitch Ratings has revised the outlooks on the country’s two state-owned lenders to “negative,” following a similar sovereign credit outlook downgrade last week. This signaled pressure on the government’s ability and willingness to support the banks. In a commentary on Tuesday, the London-based debt watchdog said the government support ratings (GSR) of

entry.title: PSEi extends slump to fifth day on war, inflation concerns #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, PHILIPPINES — The Philippine Stock Exchange Index (PSEi) fell on Tuesday, extending losses to a fifth straight session. Investors stayed cautious over geopolitical tensions and rising inflation risks. The benchmark index slipped 0.58 percent or 34.36 points to close at 5,866.79. READ: Oil rises, stock markets mixed as US-Iran peace talk hopes dim Philstocks

entry.title: Peso sets new record low, closed at 61.30:$1 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso finished past the 61-per-dollar level on Tuesday, marking a new record low. This, as the US dollar continues its bullish run amid uncertainties over the Middle East conflict. READ: US dollar still dominates forex markets The local currency weakened by 59 centavos to close at 61.30 against the greenback,

entry.title: Qatar warns Iran against using it as ‘political punching bag’ amid talks #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Qatar's diplomatic stance may stabilize Gulf tensions, potentially averting oil supply disruptions and fostering US-Iran dialogue. The post Qatar warns Iran against using it as ‘political punching bag’ amid talks appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Russia to recruit 18,500 foreign fighters by 2026, signals prolonged conflict #HowlStreet #Markets

entry.title: The Great Trade-Off: Will Your Social Security Tax Cut Be Swallowed by 2026 Tariffs? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Your Social Security check stretches less far this April than the headline tax cut promised. The reason is a quiet swap happening between two government buckets, and most retirees never see the second one. The Front-Door Tax Cut Saves Up to $1,200 and the Back-Door Tariff Bill Takes Roughly $900 of It Back The Social ... The Great Trade-Off: Will Your Social Security Tax Cut Be Swallowed by 2026 Tariffs?

entry.title: BTIG Lowers Atlassian Price Target to $110: Is the Cloud Transition Story Losing Steam? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: BTIG lowered its price target on Atlassian (NASDAQ:TEAM) to $110 from $140 while maintaining a Buy rating ahead of Q3 FY2026 results due Thursday. The cut marks the second target reduction on Atlassian shares in 24 hours, following Cantor Fitzgerald’s reduction yesterday from $146 to $98. Back-to-back price target cuts raise a fair question: is ... BTIG Lowers Atlassian Price Target to $110: Is the Cloud Transition Story Losing Steam?

entry.title: IRG Mexico Expands Portfolio with Strategic Acquisitions Totaling Over 600,000 Sq. Ft. Across Durango and Guanajuato #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: LOS ANGELES, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Industrial Realty Group, LLC (IRG), one of the largest owners and developers of commercial and industrial real estate in the United States, announced that its Mexico-based platform, IRG Mexico (IRGM), has expanded its growing international...

entry.title: Pizza Nova Welcomes Back Beloved One-Day “That’s Amore Pizza for Kids” Event on May 12 in Support of Variety Ontario #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: $5.99 medium cheese or pepperoni pizzas available across Ontario, with $1 from each pizza supporting children with disabilities TORONTO — Pizza Nova is marking a major milestone with the return of its beloved one-day fundraising event for Variety – the Children’s Charity (Ontario) as part of the 27th annual That’s Amore Pizza for Kids campaign. entry.title: Here’s what will take center stage as Alphabet gears up for earnings #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Alphabet needs to prove that its massive investments in AI are driving revenue growth. The biggest payoff could be in the cloud.
